expected_entry_identifier: Public Surface Release Lane section on the observability route
change_summary: Adds a compact Public Surface Release Lane section to the public observability route and records an owner-facing placement trial report.
public_copy_summary: Public Surface Release Lane helps package recurring public-page updates for owner review before go-live consideration. It does not deploy, approve go-live, certify production readiness, or replace owner semantic acceptance.

public_may_claim: Public Surface Release Lane helps package recurring public-page updates for owner review before go-live consideration.
The local review command generates an owner review packet.
The lane checks claim boundaries, leakage risk, unsupported proof, and review evidence.
The lane improves repeatability for public-surface updates.
public_must_not_claim: The lane is a full QA platform.
The lane replaces Prime Gate or owner review.

public_routes.intended_public_copy: Public Surface Release Lane helps package recurring public-page updates for owner review before go-live consideration. It does not deploy, approve go-live, certify production readiness, or replace owner semantic acceptance.

owner_facing_artifacts.purpose: Placement decision record and owner review notes

source_of_truth_mapping.evidence_boundary: Use public-safe summaries only; do not expose private operational artifacts.

allowed_claims: Public Surface Release Lane supports recurring public-page review before go-live consideration.

The lane improves repeatability for public-surface updates.
forbidden_claims: The lane is a full QA platform.
The lane replaces Prime Gate or owner review.
